study_title: Study of honey bee diets and DWV infection
exp_title: RNA-Seq of PBS buffer injected Apis mellifera fed no protein or lipid, 10 whole bees pooled, cage 5
design: Clean total RNA samples were diluted with RNase-free water to a final concentration of 326.6  84.7 ng/L. The samples were then used to construct poly-A, stranded libraries containing ~750bp sequences with library-specific adapters with the Next Ultra II RNA for Illumina kit (New England Biolabs, Ipswich, MA). The libraries were PCR-enriched, pooled, and sequenced (150bp paired ends) using the Illumina NovaSeq 6000 platform.
sample_title: PBS injected bees fed no protein or lipid rep 5
sample_description: RNA extracted from  10 whole bees, injected with PBS (the negative control for the infection) at <24h of age, collected from a cage of bees that were not fed any protein or lipid. Replicate cage 5.
